title: Fintastic Supreme
body:
## Introduction

This mod is a small expansion designed specifically for Tide, aiming to bring more fun and strategy to your fishing experience!

## Main Features

### Fish Finder
- **Smart Fishing Spot Analysis**: Hold the fish finder in your off-hand while fishing, sneak + right-click to save detailed data of the current fishing spot
- **Drop Probability Display**: Real-time display of drop probabilities for various fish, loot, and crates at the current fishing spot
- **Location Information**: Display fishing spot coordinates and biome information
- **Data Management**: When not fishing, sneak + right-click in main hand to clear saved data

### New Fish Information
- **Detailed Information**: Adds weight data to fish
- **Real-time Notifications**: Display catch information in chat
- **Data Persistence**: Fish weight and length information are saved on items

### Expanded Fishing Accessories, All Configurable
- **Bait**: +5/10 fishing speed
- **Lucky Bait**: +5/10 luck
- **Mixed Bait**: +2/5/10 speed, +2/5/10 luck
- **Magnetic Bait**: +2/5 speed, +50/75% crate drop probability
- **Double Catch Hook**: 15% chance to get double drops
- **Multi Drop Hook**: 25% chance to drop 1-3 additional items
- **Lucky Conductive Fishing Line**: Provides 10% extra drop chance per luck point
- **Lightweight Fishing Line**: Extends fish escape time, giving you more time to react

## License

This project is licensed under **MPL-2.0**.
> This project contains modified code (Mixin files) from an MPL-2.0 licensed mod, therefore the overall project follows the MPL-2.0 license. The original code portions (Fish Finder, fish weight system, fishing accessories, etc.) are licensed under the MIT license. See the LICENSE file in the repository for details.


**Enjoy the fun of fishing! 🎣**
